title: Form submit question
excerpt:
Forgive me if this has been answered – it seems like an easy feature that I’m surprised isn’t automated. (or maybe it is, and I just haven’t found it.)

posts.author: Scully (Scully)
posts.cookedHtml:
Forgive me if this has been answered – it seems like an easy feature that I’m surprised isn’t automated. (or maybe it is, and I just haven’t found it.)
I’d like folks to fill out an intake form with a dozen or so form fields. Upon submission, I’d like every form field answer to populate a single task new task on a board so I can triage the requests.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Scully,

If I am understanding correctly, this is exactly how our workform feature functions!

  • All about monday WorkForms

The board structure/columns make up the form and its questions. Upon submission, the form answers populate the contents of the columns.

Let me know if I’ve misunderstood!

posts.author: Scully (Scully)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks, Bianca. Almost.
I have a work form for project intake with several fields, and it’s cumbersome to horizontally scroll through for the necessary info.
In addition to columns, is there a way to show the info from the work form fields in a list?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
I hear where you’re coming from Scully! It is possible to view information in a list format via our app, the form response viewer → WorkForms Submission Viewer

Does this help?

posts.author: ANSO (Gallot Anne-Sophie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bonjour,

Je souhaite que lors du renseignement d’un formulaire (2 choix) reçu par mail, le statut change dans une ligne d’un tableau, SANS en créer un nouvel item, pour faire la mise à jour du statut.

Comment faire ?

posts.author: samking (SAM)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Scully,

If I understand correctly, this is exactly how our WorkForms feature functions! The board structure and columns make up the form and its questions, and upon submission, the answers populate the columns.

Let me know if I’ve misunderstood!
